meta.note: Live FH2 device state unavailable (FH2 HTTP 403: Forbidden). Showing last known snapshot.
Live FH2 device state unavailable (FH2 HTTP 403: Forbidden). Showing last known snapshot.

playback.viewerNote: Could not start FlightHub live stream (403). Enable Device Management + Livestream on the Organization Key in FlightHub Sync, or paste a FH2 Livestream Sharing URL below.

data.note: Camera 99-0-0 on 1581F8HGX254W00A0CHR (drone camera) but live-stream/start returned Forbidden.

Commands are gated by device readiness; execute via Shamal → FlightHub when accepted.

operations.label: Takeoff
operations.description: Launch aircraft from ground or dock.

operations.label: Land
operations.description: Land at current position.

operations.label: Hover / Hold
operations.description: Hold position and altitude (stop forward motion).

operations.label: Return to Home
operations.description: Fly back to home point and land.

operations.label: Emergency Stop
operations.description: Immediate motor stop / flight termination (use only in emergency).

operations.label: Mission Start
operations.description: Start selected wayline / flight task.

operations.label: Mission Pause
operations.description: Pause active wayline execution.

operations.label: Mission Resume
operations.description: Resume paused wayline.

operations.label: Mission Cancel
operations.description: Abort mission and hold or RTH per aircraft policy.

operations.label: Mission Recover
operations.description: Recover interrupted mission (FH2 resume-from-breakpoint).

operations.label: End Mission
operations.description: Stop mission without deleting task record.

operations.label: Open Dock Cover
operations.description: Open dock protective cover before launch.

operations.label: Close Dock Cover
operations.description: Close dock cover after landing.

operations.label: Drone Out (Launch)
operations.description: Release aircraft from dock for takeoff sequence.

operations.label: Drone In (Recover)
operations.description: Recall aircraft into dock bay.

operations.label: Dock Return Home
operations.description: Command aircraft to return to paired dock.

operations.label: Start Charging
operations.description: Enable dock battery charging cycle.

operations.label: Stop Charging
operations.description: Stop dock charging cycle.

operations.label: Take Photo
operations.description: Trigger single photo capture on live payload.

operations.label: Start Recording
operations.description: Start video recording on selected payload.

operations.label: Stop Recording
operations.description: Stop video recording.

operations.label: Gimbal Reset
operations.description: Reset gimbal to default nadir / forward.

operations.label: Switch Camera / Lens
operations.description: Switch active payload camera or lens profile.

operations.label: Refresh Control Link
operations.description: Request FH2 control channel / DRC link refresh.

operations.label: Request Flight Authority
operations.description: Request control authority when shared with another operator.

sample._raw:
openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: Shamal Middleware API for Marafiq
  version: 2.0.0
  description: |
    Read-only REST layer over Shamal’s DJI FlightHub 2 operations.
    Shamal owns and operates the drone fleet; Marafiq CAFM displays these records.
    Marafiq integrators call Shamal — never DJI credentials directly.
servers:
  - url: http://localhost:8080
    description: Local development
security:
  - ApiKeyAuth: []
components:
  securitySchemes:
    ApiKeyAuth:
      type: apiKey
      in: he
